channel.title: Webhooks on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Webhooks on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: k8s: Kubernetes v1.36: Admission Policies That Can't Be Deleted
item.description:
Kubernetes v1.36 adds an alpha manifest-based admission control feature that loads admission webhooks and CEL policies from files on disk at API server startup. It closes the bootstrap gap and allows on-disk policies to protect API-based admission resources from deletion or modification.

  • Source: Kubernetes Official Blog

item.title: github: Secret scanning improvements to alert APIs, webhooks, and delegated workflows
item.description:
GitHub is rolling out updates to secret scanning alert APIs, webhooks, and delegated workflows. The changes are aimed at improving the developer experience for secret scanning features.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure Event Grid provides new capabilities for smarter, more secure event-driven architectures
item.description:
Azure Event Grid is adding Public Preview features for event-driven architectures, focused on improved interoperability, control, and security. The announced preview includes cross-tenant webhook delivery and related capabilities for managing large-scale distributed systems.

  • Source: Azure Updates
